summary: Comprehensive E2E testing of ELEVATE coaching platform backend and frontend. All 22 backend API tests passed. Frontend flows tested: Login, Coach Selection (3 preferences), Request Wizard (3 steps), Coach Accept/Decline, Session Scheduling, Complete Journey, Feedback Submission. All critical flows working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Invalid login error message not visually displayed - error state is set but the error div with data-testid='login-error' doesn't appear on screen after failed login attempt

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement needed

action_items: Fix login error message display - the error state is being set but the error div is not rendering visually
Add aria-describedby to DialogContent components to fix accessibility warnings
critical_code_review_comments: All API endpoints working correctly with proper authentication
Cascading decline logic for coach preferences implemented correctly
Session scheduling and journey completion flow working as expected
Feedback submission properly unlocks ability to find new coach

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all critical flows working, minor login error display issue)

seed_data_creation: Database seeded with 6 coaches, 2 coachees, 1 admin via /app/backend/seed.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full E2E flow tested: Coachee selects 3 coaches -> submits request -> Coach accepts -> Coachee schedules session -> Coachee completes journey -> Coachee submits feedback -> Coachee can browse coaches again. All backend APIs tested via pytest. Notification badge working (shows unread count). The only minor issue is the login error message not displaying visually after invalid credentials.
